scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $pids = @(); if (Get-Command Get-NetTCPConnection -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique } else { $pids = netstat -ano | Select-String ':3000\s' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -Unique }; if ($pids) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; npm exec -- next dev"
